{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Arelius Soulsmiths
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Arelius Soulsmiths]] built a training course for [[Eithan]] set for two seconds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
